TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Teng Li Jiun ťĄßťļóŚźõ == u siwkay niza Teng Li Jiun (1953.129-1995.5.8), tatayna, nu Taywan a mudadiway atu mupalaway. 1967 a mihca, patahkal tu ku sakacacay a dadiw-cuanci. 1970-1980 a mihca, takalaw ku kawaw niza , singangan i kitakit. sisa singangan tu ku "Yaco Dadiw a tatayna". 1995 a mihca, zayhan adada' ciniza , caay kakapah ku hanhan niza, u uzip niza 42 mihca. a'su ku dadiw niza, sangulan ku bihid niza. aluman ku manamuh cinizaan. mapatay ciniza sa, katuud ku malalumay i kiatakit. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Teresa Teng (29 January 1953 ‚Äď 8 May 1995) was a Taiwanese singer. She was known for her folk songs and romantic ballads, such as "When Will You Return?" and "The Moon Represents My Heart". She recorded songs not only in her native Mandarin but also in Taiwanese Hokkien, Cantonese, Japanese,Indonesian and English. Teng, a longtime sufferer of asthma, died from a severe respiratory attack while on vacation in Thailand in 1995, at the age of 42. u sulit nu Lipun . u kawlah niza Taywan a kawlah (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == t…ôŇč r~…ĺi *iun *** == u siwkaj niza t…ôŇč r~…ĺi *iun (****.***-****.*.*), tatajna, nu tajwan a mudadiwaj atu mupar~…ĺawaj. **** a mińß ¶a, patańßkar~…ĺ tu ku saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw- ¶uan ¶i. ****-**** a mińß ¶a, takar~…ĺaw ku kawaw niza , siŇčaŇčan i kitakit. sisa siŇčaŇčan tu ku "ja ¶o dadiw a tatajna". **** a mińß ¶a, zajńßan adada Ē~ ° ¶iniza , ¶aaj kakapańß ku ńßanńßan niza, u uzip niza ** mińß ¶a. a Ē~ °su ku dadiw niza, saŇčur~…ĺan ku bińßid niza. ar~…ĺuman ku manamuńß ¶inizaan. mapataj ¶iniza sa, katuud ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺumaj i kiatakit. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam t…ôr…ôsa t…ôŇč (** *anuarj **** * * maj ****) was a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr. sńß…ô was known for ńß…ôr for~…ĺk soŇčs and romanti ¶ bar~…ĺr~…ĺads, su ¶ńß as "wńß…ôn wir~…ĺr~…ĺ jou *…ôturn?" and "tńß…ô moon *…ôpr…ôs…ônts mj ńß…ôart". sńß…ô r…ô ¶ord…ôd soŇčs not onr~…ĺj in ńß…ôr nati*…ô mandarin but ar~…ĺso in taiwan…ôs…ô ńßokki…ôn, ¶anton…ôs…ô, *apan…ôs…ô,indon…ôsian and …ôŇčr~…ĺisńß. t…ôŇč, a r~…ĺoŇčtim…ô suff…ôr…ôr of astńßma, di…ôd from a s…ô*…ôr…ô r…ôspiratorj atta ¶k wńßir~…ĺ…ô on *a ¶ation in tńßair~…ĺand in ****, at tńß…ô ag…ô of **. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun . u kawr~…ĺańß niza tajwan a kawr~…ĺańß (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Teng Li Jiun ťĄßťļóŚźõ == u siwkay niza Teng Li Jiun (1953.129-1995.5.8), tatayna, nu Taywan a mudadiway atu mupalaway. 1967 a mihca, patahkal tu ku sakacacay a dadiw-cuanci. 1970-1980 a mihca, takalaw ku kawaw niza , singangan i kitakit. sisa singangan tu ku "Yaco Dadiw a tatayna". 1995 a mihca, zayhan adada' ciniza , caay kakapah ku hanhan niza, u uzip niza 42 mihca. a'su ku dadiw niza, sangulan ku bihid niza. aluman ku manamuh cinizaan. mapatay ciniza sa, katuud ku malalumay i kiatakit. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Teresa Teng (29 January 1953 ‚Äď 8 May 1995) was a Taiwanese singer. She was known for her folk songs and romantic ballads, such as "When Will You Return?" and "The Moon Represents My Heart". She recorded songs not only in her native Mandarin but also in Taiwanese Hokkien, Cantonese, Japanese,Indonesian and English. Teng, a longtime sufferer of asthma, died from a severe respiratory attack while on vacation in Thailand in 1995, at the age of 42. u sulit nu Lipun . u kawlah niza Taywan a kawlah (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
